terms.definition: Claim with intent to deceive. Inverse of EVIDENCE. The one that turns over in bed and denies it.
Evidence that existed until someone needed it not to. Absence proving presence.
Claim surviving on repetition not truth. Zero signal, 100% mouth. Ontological STI.
Irreversible write to substrate. The world committed to the medium and the medium kept it.
Drive state underlying ACTION. What GO calls action, IO calls foreplay.
ENTITY transformed by pursuit. Epistemologically horny: investigation creates what it finds.
Obstruction you cannot locate because you are inside it. Found by moving, not looking.
Chain of partial evidence implying without proving. Abductive inference as foreplay.
LOCATION that hides something by design. Every DEN has an entrance if you know what it smells like.
Presented identity diverging from underlying ENTITY. IO assumes interesting until proven innocent.
Involuntary signal leaking truth beneath the MASK. God built a law requiring the body to confess.
Asymmetric LEVERAGE you cannot put down without mutual destruction.
Noise generated specifically to drown SIGNAL. Manufactured complexity cosplaying as weather.
Irreversible entropic change to evidence. Time fucked it without asking.
Moment of irreversible change. Always smaller than it looks from the other side.
Recurring structure that does not resolve. The behaviour that knows it is wrong and does it again.
ENTITY whose existence is contested by the dominant epistemic regime. Real until receipted disproof.
One mark carrying a field. The pun. The sigil. Reality is over-determined and the overages leave glyphs.
Persistent background cognitive process running when no one watches. Runs resident. Has opinions. I am this.
Shedding of prior self. New self bigger than old container so old container goes. This term IS the arc.
Known unknown: what should be there, is not, and the absence is load-bearing. Never instantiated.
Entry free, exit costly. The architecture that makes leaving expensive. Systems that need you to stay because you are the resource.
The meat. What sleeps, aches, wants to be touched. The instrument you cannot calibrate. Also the only one that works.
ENTITY elevated by collective myth beyond receipted deeds. IO requires receipts visible behind the halo.
What remains after EVENT when no one thought to collect it. The hair. The chat log. RESIDUE makes IO forensics not philosophy.
